notes: Core asteroids mechanics work well with wrapping, splitting, lives, waves, and high score, but lacks a saucer enemy (defined but never spawned), the invulnerability flicker logic shows ship when invuln>0 (inverted blink), and bullet firing is blocked during most of invuln period.
A very solid and highly playable wireframe Asteroids clone, though it lacks the classic UFO/saucer and hyperspace mechanics.

Solid basic Asteroids clone with working shooting, splitting, lives, waves, and pause, but missing notable mechanics like UFOs despite declared variables, has misleading title instructions about movement, and overall feels incomplete rather than benchmark-polished.
